arts.ttl: Daniel Farke drops Leeds United rotation hint for Cardiff City with Junior Firpo admission
arts.sum: Daniel Farke is delighted with the form of Sam Byram but says he is not “naive” to think the 31-year-old can play every single Leeds United game, admitting he is pleased to have Junior Firpo back for possible selection. Defending Jaidon Anthony [who] was an important player for Burnley, to take him more or less out of the game, I think he was excellent in defending terms.

arts.ttl: Leeds United star can make strong case for signing of the season, and it’s not Tanaka
arts.sum: Leeds United made several signings to strengthen their squad during the summer, but not very few in the Championship can say they have performed better than Jayden Bogle . When Leeds lost in the playoff final and lost Archie Gray, Crysencio Summerville and Georginio Rutter, not many would have expected Daniel Farke’s squad to be performing better in attack and defence than they were at this stage last season.

arts.ttl: Six players could miss Leeds United Championship clash vs Cardiff City
arts.sum: “At the moment, yeah, Patrick is more or less the only one who was not back in the team training and sadly also we need to manage Max Wober during this week because on Tuesday was also not able to train, his knee made some problems again. Daniel Farke, though, was handed some positive injury news this week with Pascal Struijk returning to team training on Tuesday following his hamstring injury.

arts.ttl: Saturday's Championship predictions including Leeds vs. Cardiff City
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Championship fixtures, including Leeds vs. Cardiff City.

arts.ttl: Leeds United have January transfer avenue closed after latest update
arts.sum: The Magpies have bid farewell to winger Miguel Almiron, who returned to MLS club Atlanta United, with Howe not expecting any more departures this month, despite Targett's links to Elland Road. Newcastle United boss Eddie Howe all but confirmed that Targett would remain at St. James' Park in his press conference this morning.

arts.ttl: Leeds United's Cameron Archer transfer pursuit set for more clarity
arts.sum: Daniel Farke has outlined which boxes he wishes to be ticked regarding January transfer recruits at Leeds United; they must be of good quality, of great character and affordable. Farke has acknowledged that, currently, Leeds are an injury away from having just one fit striker available.

arts.ttl: ‘I’ve not put this out anywhere’: Sky journalist shares what he’s now been told about Matt Targett and Leeds
arts.sum: The transfer window closes in a few days’ time, and there are a number of teams that have work to do. Newcastle United may want...

arts.ttl: Cardiff City boss has Leeds United Elland Road theory he thinks will aid promotion rivals
arts.sum: Cardiff City manager Omer Riza has suggested that pressure placed on Leeds United by their own fans could play a role in Saturday’s Championship clash. Leeds themselves are 11 games undefeated in the league and sit top after 29 matches.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola reveal throws spanner in the works amid Leeds United transfer interest
arts.sum: Leeds United will have to look elsewhere this month if they want to bolster their midfield options with Manchester City midfielder James McAtee set to stay at the Etihad Stadium. The arrival of Omar Marmoush and return of Oscar Bobb will add further competition for places in City's squad for the second half of the season but McAtee looks set to stay at Man City after Pep Guardiola's latest reveal.

arts.ttl: Leeds United in talks with UK club to let defender leave, in final 6 months of ER contract
arts.sum: Leeds United’s U21 centre-back Jeremiah Mullen is in talks with Scottish Championship side Dunfermline Athletic over a loan transfer that would likely end his stay at Elland Road. The YEP have shared this Friday that Leeds are in talks with Scottish Championship side Dunfermline Athletic over sanctioning a loan exit for U21 centre-back Jeremiah Mullen.
